page_metadata.biotools__summary: This functional gene-set tool for the analysis of NGS data consists of "seq2gene" and "gene2path" components. The seq2gene component links sequence-level measurements of genomic regions (including SNPs or point mutation coordinates) to gene-level scores, and the gene2path feature summarizes gene scores to pathway-scores for each sample.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This functional gene-set tool for the analysis of NGS data consists of "seq2gene" and "gene2path" components. The seq2gene component links sequence-level measurements of genomic regions (including SNPs or point mutation coordinates) to gene-level scores, and the gene2path feature summarizes gene scores to pathway-scores for each sample.
